100m Sprint.context: Athletes in the Reactive Speedster archetype have historically been represented in the 9.7s–10.2s range across Team USA's 120 years.

200m Sprint.context: Sprint specialists with this archetype have historically clocked in the 19.3s–20.5s range.

Shot Put.context: Athletes in the Explosive Powerhouse archetype have historically thrown between 19.5m and 23.5m for Team USA.

Discus Throw.context: Discus throwers in this archetype have historically been represented in the 60m–72m range.

Marathon.context: Marathon athletes in the Aerobic Engine archetype have historically finished in 2:08–2:20 ranges.

Long Jump.context: Long jumpers in this archetype have historically been represented in the 8.20m–8.95m range.

Sprint Wheelchair Racing (T51-T54).context: Athletes with this profile in T54 100m wheelchair racing have historically been represented in the 13.5s–14.8s range.

Paralympic Powerlifting.context: Paralympic powerlifters with this archetype have historically lifted between 180kg and 240kg in their weight class.

Weightlifting.context: Olympic weightlifters in this archetype have historically posted total scores in the 320kg–410kg range.
